hero.headline: Your IT partner for {highlight} intelligence.
hero.sub: D3 delivers enterprise time attendance, HRMS, queue management and digital signage — built for the GCC region since 2010.

timetech.title: TimeTech Application
timetech.desc: D3's flagship product — a complete cloud-based workforce management suite with time attendance, HR, payroll, visitor management and self-service portal.

timeAttendance.title: Time Attendance & HRMS
timeAttendance.desc: Cloud-based fingerprint and face recognition attendance with full payroll, leave, appraisal and self-service. Built for GCC.

queue.title: Queue Management
queue.desc: Wired, wireless and cloud-based queue systems for ministries and private sector. WhatsApp virtual queue included.

signage.title: Digital Signage
signage.desc: LED displays, vertical signage and e-books for any indoor or outdoor deployment. IP power controller included.

rfid.title: RFID & Asset Tracking
rfid.desc: Asset, document and warehouse tracking with RFID or barcode across multiple buildings, departments and categories.

cctv.title: IP CCTV & Access Control
cctv.desc: Enterprise-grade IP surveillance and biometric access control tailored to GCC security requirements.

erp.title: ERP & Retail Management
erp.desc: End-to-end ERP, inventory management, electronic shelf labels and ID card solutions for enterprise retail.

timetech.title: Meet {highlight} — D3's Workforce Intelligence Platform
timetech.sub: One platform. Full lifecycle workforce management. Trusted by 500+ organisations across the GCC.

industries.title: Built for your {highlight}
industries.sub: D3 solutions are deployed across government, banking, healthcare, retail and logistics — with local compliance built in.

government.title: Government
government.desc: Labour law compliance, LMRA integration, Ministry-grade security.

healthcare.title: Healthcare
healthcare.desc: Shift management, credential tracking, patient queue systems.

banking.title: Banking & Finance
banking.desc: SOX-compliant attendance, secure access, visitor screening.

retail.title: Retail
retail.desc: ERP, electronic shelf labels, inventory and POS integration.

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.desc: RFID asset tracking, warehouse management, fleet CCTV.

why.title: The D3 {highlight}
why.sub: We don't just deliver technology — we deliver outcomes. Here's what separates us from every other IT vendor in the region.

gcc.title: GCC-first Design
gcc.text: Built for the Gulf — Arabic support, local labour law compliance and GCC regulatory standards built in from day one.

custom.title: 100% Customisable
custom.text: Fully configurable platforms that integrate with any third-party ERP or existing system — no vendor lock-in, ever.

cloud.title: Cloud & On-Premise
cloud.text: Cloud (AWS), on-server or hybrid — D3 solutions flex to your infrastructure and security requirements without compromise.

support.title: Full-Lifecycle Support
support.text: From consultancy and implementation to ongoing support — one relationship, one contact, complete peace of mind.

caseStudies.title: Real results for real {highlight}
caseStudies.sub: See how D3 has transformed operations across the GCC.

1.title: Discovery
1.desc: We analyse your requirements, existing systems and compliance needs.

2.title: Solution Design
2.desc: Custom configuration, integration planning and timeline sign-off.

3.title: Implementation
3.desc: Rapid deployment with full testing, training and data migration.

4.title: Ongoing Support
4.desc: Dedicated account management, SLA-backed support and updates.

cta.title: Ready to {highlight} your operations?
cta.sub: Schedule a live demo and see how D3 can streamline your workforce, queues and infrastructure from day one.

clients.title: 500+ organisations trust {highlight}
clients.sub: From government ministries to leading banks, retailers and hospitals across the GCC and beyond.

contact.title: Let's talk about your {highlight}
contact.sub: Fill in your details and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

blog.title: Insights & {highlight}
blog.sub: Industry insights, product updates and best practices from the D3 team.

about.title: Built in Bahrain. Trusted {highlight}.
about.p1: D3 — Digital Data Dimensions — was established in 2010 to deliver information technology solutions for small, medium and large enterprises across the Middle-East and Europe.
about.p2: Our mission has always been to build long-term professional partnerships, not just sell software. Our team brings decades of experience across IT and real-world business operations.
